keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY EPIGASTRIUM. Epigastrium : Ars., Calc-c., Chel., Coloc., Ign., Ip., Kali-c., Lach., Lob., Lyc., Nat-m., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Sep., Sul., Tab. Epigastrium, above : Pho. Epigastrium, aching : Sil. Epigastrium, anxiety at : Ars., Lyc., Nux-v., Pul. Epigastrium, burning : Ars., Nux-v., Sep., Sil. Epigastrium, cough , from : Bry., Nit-ac., Pho-ac., Pho. Epigastrium, cramp , pinching, etc. : Sil., Ver-a. Epigastrium, lump above , as of : Nat-c., Nat-m., Pho., Pul. Epigastrium, pain in : Ars., Nux-v., Ver-a. Epigastrium, pressure : Cup., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Ver-a. Epigastrium, sensitive : Bry., Calc-c., Carb-v., Chin., Hyo., Kali-c., Lach., Lyc., Nux-v., Ver-a. Epigastrium, sticking : Arn., Bry., Nit-ac., Rhus-t., Sep., Sul. Epigastrium, swelled : Calc-c., Nux-v. Epigastrium, throbbing : Asaf., Kali-c., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep. Epigastrium, upward (up throat, etc.) : Aco., Ars., Calc-c., Carb-v., Fer., Kali-bi., Kali-c., Lyc., Nat-m., Nux-v., Pho. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
